"'''Virtual Sith'''" was an article in [[Star Wars Insider 88|''Star Wars Insider'' 88]], written by [[Hugh Sterbakov]]. It was about the depiction of [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] in [[LucasArts]] games. It was also featured in ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 65]]''.

==Contents==
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] {{C|Human incarnation}}
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] {{C|Armored}}
*Darth Vader {{C|[[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced fighter]]}}
*[[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]]
*[[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]]
*[[Dooku/Legends|Darth Tyranus]]
*[[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]
*[[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]]
*[[Darth Malak]]
*[[Darth Sion]]
*[[Darth Nihilus]]
*[[Desann]]
*[[Tavion Axmis|Tavion]]
